title: Create: Skybound
description: Create: Skybound is a technical-adventure modpack focused on mechanical engineering and airborne construction.
body:
Create: Skybound is a technical-adventure modpack focused on mechanical engineering and airborne construction. Build complex Create contraptions, power advanced engines, and design fully mobile ships using Valkyrien Skies. Progress centres on automation, logistics, and scalable industry, with exploration shifting from the ground to the skies. Designed for players who enjoy problem-solving, emergent engineering, and building moving factories in a living world.

Aetherial Islands:
1. Open the profile folder on modrith
2. Navigate to the datapacks folder
3. In your minecraft, start creating a new world
4. select datapacks and drag Aetherial_Islands.zip into minecaft
5. create the world
